beforeEn: Each business project required separate agent development, creating a chaotic landscape
before: 业务项目都需要单独开发Agent，相对混乱
after: 业务项目内的Agent统一由中台管理运行，便于监控和节省开发时间
excerptEn: Unified agent management for monitoring and development efficiency
description: 项目已经初步上线，基本聊天功能可用，正在完善skill/mcp/kb/rag相关联调。将业务项目内的Agent统一由中台管理运行，便于监控和节省开发时间，避免各业务项目单独开发Agent的混乱局面。
excerpt: 统一管理业务Agent，便于监控和节省开发时间
afterEn: All business project agents unified under central platform management for better monitoring and reduced dev time
name: AI 中台
descriptionEn: Initially launched with basic chat functionality. Currently refining skill/MCP/KB/RAG integration. Unifies business project agents under central management for better monitoring and reduced development time, eliminating chaotic separate agent development.

beforeEn: AE requirement → AE build Cols → AE submit SO → PD review → identify options → SO/BOM generated → AE confirm. Entirely manual process
before: AE客户需求表→AE搭建Cols系统数据→AE提交SO新建流程→产品定义审核兼容性→识别新Option→SO及BOM生成→AE确认状态，全流程手动
after: 流程自动化，校验本地化，减少AE重复提交，增加PD节点自动化操作
excerptEn: Auto-verification, RPA replacing PD operations, compatibility validation
description: 项目实现：自动校核Cols导出报告校核、RPA按操作步骤代替PD操作新建SO、自动校验Windchill/本地库中变更SO的兼容性逻辑、BOM校核。将AE客户需求到SO及BOM生成的整个流程自动化，减少AE重复提交流程，增加PD节点自动化操作。
excerpt: 自动校核、RPA代替PD操作、兼容性校验一体化
afterEn: Process automated with localized validation. Reduced AE repetitive submissions. Added PD node automation
name: AI辅助BOM搭建
descriptionEn: Implemented: auto Cols report verification, RPA replacing PD to create SOs, auto Windchill/local library SO compatibility validation, BOM verification. Automates the entire AE-to-SO/BOM workflow, reducing AE repetitive submissions and adding PD node automation.

beforeEn: Manual table processing consumed significant time, approximately 10 hours monthly
before: 手工处理相关表，占用大量工时，每月约10个小时
after: 全自动结合HRIS和手工表，所有维度数据和历史对比一键导出
excerptEn: Fully automated HRIS + manual table integration with one-click export
description: 已经交付一版，覆盖HRIS源的所有相关数据，后续等待用户输入手工数据整理结果后再合并到报表中。将人工处理相关表占用的每月10个小时工时，升级为全自动结合HRIS和手工表，所有维度数据和历史对比一键导出。
excerpt: 全自动结合HRIS和手工表，一键导出多维数据对比
afterEn: Fully automated HRIS + manual table integration with one-click multi-dimension data and historical comparison export
name: 人力成本导出程序
descriptionEn: First version delivered, covering all HRIS source data. Awaiting manual data consolidation before merging into reports. Upgrades monthly 10-hour manual table processing to fully automated HRIS + manual table integration with one-click multi-dimension export and historical comparison.

beforeEn: Issue tracing and engine parts info query available on legacy ELM but with suboptimal experience
before: 问题的追溯和发动机零部件等各项信息的查询在老的ELM平台可以查询但体验不完美
after: 实现AI快速追溯、查询并提供可用的建议，目标追溯效率提升100%
excerptEn: AI fast traceability, query, and actionable recommendations
description: 目前正在评审Demo和功能可操作性。将老ELM平台的问题追溯和发动机零部件信息查询功能通过AI技术升级，实现AI快速追溯、查询并提供可用的建议，目标追溯效率提升100%。
excerpt: AI快速追溯、查询并提供可用的建议
afterEn: AI fast traceability and query with actionable recommendations. Target: 100% efficiency improvement
name: ELM AI重构
descriptionEn: Currently reviewing demo and functional feasibility. Upgrading legacy ELM platform issue tracing and engine parts query with AI technology. Enables AI fast traceability, query, and actionable recommendations. Target: 100% tracing efficiency improvement.

beforeEn: Manual recording of machining changes with inconvenient recording, statistics, and query
before: 手工记录机加变更信息，记录不便、统计不便、查询困难
after: 快速开发小程序解决以上问题，便捷性和效率提升数倍
excerptEn: AI-developed mini-app for convenient change recording and statistics
description: 利用AI快速开发的小程序，目前已上线。解决手工记录机加变更信息不便、统计不便、查询困难的痛点。通过快速开发小程序实现便捷记录、统计和查询，效率提升数倍。
excerpt: AI快速开发的小程序，便捷记录与统计变更信息
afterEn: Rapid mini-app development solving all issues with several-fold convenience and efficiency improvement
name: 机加变更管理程序
descriptionEn: AI-accelerated mini-app development, now live. Addresses pain points of inconvenient manual machining change recording, statistics, and query. Achieves convenient recording, statistics, and query with several-fold efficiency improvement.
